cards.front: What does Horspool’s Algorithm primarily use for?
What is the main focus of Input Enhancement in String Matching?
cards.back: Improving the efficiency of string matching algorithms

cards.front: What is Horspool’s Algorithm's key optimization technique?
cards.back: Shift operation based on the last character match

cards.front: What is the time complexity of Horspool’s Algorithm?
cards.back: O(n+m) on average, where n is the length of the pattern and m is the length of the text

cards.front: What is the primary goal of Input Enhancement in string matching?
cards.back: To reduce the number of shift operations during the matching process
